message:
Merge PR #2001: fix(seance): find sessions in single-account setups without accounts.json

Bug fix: adds fallback to scan ~/.claude/projects/ when accounts.json is
missing or yields no results, fixing seance in single-account setups. Also
handles cross-project-dir sessions within the same account.

Conflict resolution: kept main's EvalSymlinks comparison (handles macOS
/var → /private/var symlink differences) over PR's direct string comparison.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2001
Author: dmotles (Daniel Motles)
Co-authored-by: Daniel Motles <dmotles@users.noreply.github.com>
